display.purpose: Page H1, quiz question. One per page.

headline.purpose: Section headings when a second level is needed.

title.purpose: Card headings, product names in results.

shadows.name: signal-glow
shadows.purpose: Primary CTA button only. Not reused elsewhere.

shadows.name: ambient-glow
shadows.purpose: Hero section accent only. Extremely subtle.

motion.name: standard
motion.purpose: Default easing for all transitions: slide-up, fade-in.

motion.name: score-reveal
motion.purpose: Score bar left-to-right reveal on page load only.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main CTA. Signal indigo. Used for quiz entry and affiliate links.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; background: #4f46e5; color: #ffffff; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; padding: 14px 32px; border-radius: 12px; border: none; cursor: pointer; box-shadow: 0 10px 15px -3px rgb(49 46 129 / 0.3); transition: background 150ms ease-out, transform 150ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #6366f1; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #3730a3; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.98); }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Low-priority action. Back navigation, secondary CTAs.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: #6b7280; font-size: 14px; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid #1f2937; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms ease-out, color 150ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: #111827; color: #d1d5db; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #3730a3; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Content Card
components.description: Related page card, product card, intent link. Flat at rest, lifts on hover.
components.html: Best Gaming Laptops Under £1,000GPU-weighted rankings for mid-budget builds.
components.css: .ds-card { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; background: #111827; border: 1px solid #1f2937; border-radius: 12px; padding: 14px 16px; text-decoration: none; transition: border-color 150ms ease-out, transform 150ms ease-out; } .ds-card:hover { border-color: rgba(55 48 163 / 0.5); transform: translateY(-2px); } .ds-card:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #3730a3; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-card-title { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; color: #e5e7eb; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-card-title:hover { color: #818cf8; } .ds-card-desc { font-size: 12px; color: #6b7280; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; }

components.name: Intelligence Badge
components.description: AEL/auto-generated content signal. Analysis Violet palette only.
components.css: .ds-badge-intelligence { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; background: #2e1065; color: #8b5cf6; border: 1px solid #5b21b6; border-radius: 9999px; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; letter-spacing: 0.05em; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 2px 8px; }

components.name: Score Bar
components.description: DEN's signature ranked score visualization. Clip-path reveal on load.
components.html:
Gaming
82
components.css: .ds-score-row { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; } .ds-score-label { font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; color: #6b7280; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.1em; min-width: 80px; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-score-track { flex: 1; height: 8px; background: #1f2937; border-radius: 9999px; overflow: hidden; } .ds-score-fill { height: 100%; background: #4f46e5; border-radius: 9999px; clip-path: inset(0 100% 0 0); animation: ds-score-reveal 1.2s cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1) 400ms forwards; } @keyframes ds-score-reveal { to { clip-path: inset(0 0% 0 0); } } @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .ds-score-fill { clip-path: none; animation: none; } } .ds-score-value { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; color: #ffffff; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; min-width: 28px; text-align: right; }

components.name: Site Navigation
components.description: Sticky top nav with blur. Logo mark + category links + badges.
components.html:
DDEN
LaptopsPhones
components.css: .ds-nav { position: sticky; top: 0; z-index: 20; backdrop-filter: blur(8px); background: rgba(3 7 18 / 0.8); border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(31 41 55 / 0.4); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding: 16px 24px; } .ds-nav-logo { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; text-decoration: none; } .ds-nav-logomark { width: 24px; height: 24px; border-radius: 6px; background: #4f46e5; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700; color: #ffffff; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-nav-brand { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; color: #ffffff; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-nav-links { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; } .ds-nav-link { font-size: 12px; color: #6b7280; text-decoration: none; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; transition: color 150ms ease-out; } .ds-nav-link:hover { color: #d1d5db; }

narrative.overview:
DEN is not a UI, a blog, or a comparison tool. It is a decision system that produces outcomes. The design reflects this: tools are visible but not decorative, every element exists for a purpose, output quality matters more than visual flourish. The workbench metaphor is exact — a place built by experts, for decisions, where the instrument you reach for is always exactly where it should be.

The system is dark by design. Users arrive mid-research, often at night, cross-referencing multiple tabs. The dark surface reduces ambient fatigue and signals 'I'm already working' — not 'let me sell you something.' Depth is conveyed through tonal layering (three levels: base, surface, raised) not shadows. The single accent, Signal indigo, appears sparingly. When it appears, it means something.

This is the antithesis of the autopilot SEO content farm: no thin editorial filler, no affiliate-first structure, no AI slop aesthetic.
keyCharacteristics: Tonal dark with cold blue-gray neutrals — no warm blacks
One accent color (Signal indigo) used at strict ≤10% surface coverage
System font stack — no web font load, no layout shift
Tight tracking on headings; loose leading on body
Components are flat at rest, responsive to interaction only
AEL/intelligence layer uses a distinct violet sub-palette to signal automation

rules.name: The Signal Scarcity Rule
rules.body: Signal indigo covers ≤10% of any given screen. Its rarity is the point.

rules.name: The Violet Firewall Rule
rules.body: Analysis Violet is reserved exclusively for the AEL intelligence layer. It must never appear on navigation, editorial content, or CTAs.

rules.name: The Weight-Only Emphasis Rule
rules.body: Emphasis is conveyed through font weight and color step changes only. Italic, underline, and color highlights are prohibited in editorial content.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Every surface is flat at rest. Shadows appear only as interactive state feedback (hover, focus) or as a single structural marker (primary CTA).

dos: Use tonal layering (Workbench Deep → Instrument Surface → Boundary Line) to convey depth
Cap Signal indigo to ≤10% of any given screen surface
Use Output Text (#ffffff) for headings and ranked results only
Use font-weight contrast (400/600/700) for typographic hierarchy
Keep Analysis Violet exclusively for machine-generated / AEL content
Respect prefers-reduced-motion for all clip-path and transform animations
Keep body line length at 65–75ch maximum
Give interactive elements a clear hover state — flat at rest, responsive to touch
donts: Don't build autopilot SEO content — thin editorial, affiliate-first structure, AI boilerplate
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text with any gradient)
Don't use glassmorphism as decoration — navbar blur is structural only
Don't build price comparison aggregator layouts
Don't use warm blacks or warm grays — all neutrals must be cold blue-gray
Don't add shadows to cards at rest
Don't use Analysis Violet for navigation, CTAs, or user-initiated actions
Don't animate layout properties — opacity and transform only
Don't use side-stripe borders (border-left/right > 1px as colored accent)
Don't restate the page title as the first sentence of body copy
